description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing spoiler. The body is primarily white with a contrasting black hood and roof, giving it a striking two-tone appearance. The car features aggressive front air intakes, sculpted side panels, and tinted windows, all contributing to its sporty and modern look. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with a dark finish and blue highlights, enhancing its racing aesthetic. The rear of the car is equipped with a wide spoiler and dual exhausts, emphasizing its speed-oriented design. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction, typical of luxury sports vehicles.
description: A white and black sports car with a large rear spoiler, sculpted body, and dark multi-spoke wheels with blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aggressive air intakes, black hood, and sleek headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted doors, large wheels, and prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide spoiler, dual exhausts, and black roof detail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the wheels, spoiler, and side profile.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with blue accents
